name: Cursed Treasure Level Pack
author: Poki
description: Cursed Treasure is back with a new level pack! Cursed Treasure Level Pack is a tower defense game where you play as an evil overlord. Protect your gems from waves of heroes with, awesome upgradable towers, new skills, and devastating spells in as much as 15 new levels! Replay levels to get "brilliant" scores, and unlock many new skills! How to play: In a tower defense game, waves of enemies come to attack your castle. You have to build towers with special abilities to defend your castle and your treasures. Use your mouse to choose which towers you want to build and where you want to place them. About the creator: Cursed Treasure Level Pack was created by Iriysoft, and is the new installment to the Cursed Treasure series.
